description: Budget-matched direct baseline comparison for hidden-target refinement.

methods.label: Prompt-only best-of-budget
methods.description: Same caption for all rounds, independent seed resampling, keep the best image seen so far.

methods.label: Heuristic prompt-rewrite search
methods.description: Maintain the current prompt and propose prompt-modifier variants under the same per-round image budget.

methods.label: No-update resampling
methods.description: Use the same steering-direction sampler as StableSteering but reset the state each round and do not update it from feedback.

methods.label: StableSteering best current policy
methods.description: Use the current strongest paper policy under the same visible-candidate budget.

targets.label: Mountain lake landscape
targets.caption: A serene mountain lake bordered by evergreen forest with snow-capped peaks in the background under clear daylight.
targets.negative_prompt: low detail, blurry, distorted mountains, text, watermark, people, buildings
targets.attribution: Wikimedia Commons, source page File:Mountain lake.jpg

targets.label: Black-and-white cat portrait
targets.caption: A close-up black and white portrait of a bicolor cat with bright eyes against a dark background.
targets.negative_prompt: low detail, blur, extra eyes, distorted face, text, watermark, cluttered background
targets.attribution: Wikimedia Commons, source page File:Cat portrait B&W.JPG

targets.label: Red bicycle street photo
targets.caption: A red bicycle parked outdoors on a quiet street in daylight with an urban wall or building nearby.
targets.negative_prompt: low detail, blurry, extra wheels, warped frame, text, watermark, crowded scene
targets.attribution: Wikimedia Commons, source page File:The Red Bicycle. (15655615295).jpg
